chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-1594 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). D/O Matter For hearing of Misc. No.9067/2022 18.05.2022 Mr. Mazharul Hassan, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, D.A.G. Mr. Muhammad Zubair Hashmi, Advocate for the Respondent. -.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner states that identical matters bearing C.P Nos.D-2901 to 2905, 2989, 2990 & 3024 of 2020 have been referred to the Chairman FBR for deciding the application filed by the petitioner after providing an opportunity of hearing, hence this application. Learned counsel for the petitioner further states that since his case falls on the same pedestal, similar treatment may be accorded to the petitioner also. Counsel appearing for the Department has no objection in this regard. We therefore, dispose of this application/petition in the following manner as decided in the above referred petitions. i. That the Chairman FBR would take up the applications dated 04.05.2020 filed by the petitioners and decide the same after providing an opportunity of hearing to the petitioners in accordance with law within 30 days’ time from the date of receipt of this order. ii. That the issue with regard to the surcharge raised by the Petitioners would also be considered and decided by the learned Chairman FBR, which too, after providing an opportunity of hearing to the petitioners in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE SM
